title: ramirezella buseri
side_effects: Ramirezella buseri can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In rare cases, it may also lead to respiratory problems, like shortness of breath and wheezing, particularly among individuals with pre-existing lung conditions. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant can cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches, often referred to as a "buseri reaction." If not properly monitored, prolonged use of the plant may also contribute to liver damage and impaired kidney function.
